programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects inspected by Fiona Bruce and the experts include the first transatlantic airmail letter brought on the plane piloted by Alcock and Brown in 1919; uncomfortable diaries of an SS officer imprisoned in Britain in World War II.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects brought in include a ship's anchor, a medal given for heroism to a local sailor who helped break Captain Scott's ship out of Antarctic ice in 1901, and a rare example of early flat pack furniture dating back to the 17th century.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts examine items such as a rare booklet containing notes made in the 17th century by one of Shakespeare's earliest readers; a gold ring complete with a moving letter tells the story of a British family that joined the Californian gold rush.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Cindy surprises Brandon by coming to visit for Christmas. Joe tries to keep an antsy Donna in suspense about her Christmas/birthday present.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie's really annoying friend Ginger returns to town. Clare and Donna confront Kelly after finding drugs in the apartment. Brandon, Steve and Joe accept Jonathan's invitation to go flying in biplanes.

programme.desc: Valerie tries to pacify Ginger by setting her up with Jonathan. Donna's sorority asks students to go without sex for 24 hours in order to promote abstinence as a means of preventing venereal diseases. Clare bets that Steve cannot make good on his pledge.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Colin visits Kelly and announces that he has kicked his cocaine habit. Kelly gets a roommate, a troubled teenage runaway named Tara. Valerie has the house to herself as Steve and Brandon leave for a ski weekend with Clare, Susan and David.

programme.desc: Brandon and Susan spend the weekend at her parents' house. Colin and Valerie's new relationship upsets David and Kelly. Joe's older brother Hank comes to town and tries to discourage him from undergoing surgery.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Luego de capturar a un vendedor de armas internacional, el equipo de NCIS descubre que un sistema de armamento altamente clasificado de la Marina está a punto de ser vendido a otro importante contrabandista llamado "La Grenouille" (Armand Assante).

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Trabajando con los oficiales locales, el equipo de NCIS cree que un marinero murió de una sobredosis involuntaria en una sórdida parte de la ciudad.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo colaboran con un inspector de la Agencia Internacional de Energía Atómica que sufre de envenenamiento por radiación. Recreando su rutina, intentan descubrir donde y cómo se produjo la contaminación.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando Ducky y Abby confirman que han identificado los restos de al menos cinco personas, el equipo de NCIS comienza inmediatamente a notificar a sus familias, con la intención de encontrar una conexión entre la azarosa selección de víctimas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un hombre que vivía una doble vida con dos familias. Al mismo tiempo, Anthony lucha con la decisión de ayudar a Erin a investigar a su antiguo compañero, a quien ella sospecha de robar dinero de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que el cuñado de Danny, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se enreda con la mafia y roba su tarjeta de crédito, Danny obliga a Jimmy a enfrentarse a los mafiosos con la ayuda de Baez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer se queja de que la NYPD no ha encontrado al asesino de su hijo, Danny reabre el caso. Esto molesta al detective original, Erin, y a Anthony, que lo habían dejado de lado por falta de pruebas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a San Francisco cuando una serie de asesinatos lleva a creer que El asesino del Zodíaco podría haber regresado. Mientras tanto, Reid reflexiona si podría hacer algo más con sus habilidades de genio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo es llamado para buscar a un violador en serie de Houston conocido como El pianista, que ha vuelto y está atacando a sus víctimas anteriores. Por otra parte, Prentiss comienza un tratamiento por la experiencia traumática causada por Ian Doyle.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Luego de capturar a un vendedor de armas internacional, el equipo de NCIS descubre que un sistema de armamento altamente clasificado de la Marina está a punto de ser vendido a otro importante contrabandista llamado "La Grenouille" (Armand Assante).

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes several units on a reckless journey on the wrong side of the highway. Officers sets up a reverse sting operation designed to capture a suspected drug dealer. Officers decide to pull over a driver who intentionally avoided a road block.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chatty motorist becomes agitated when officers start asking questions, a fleeing driver calls his wife in the middle of a pursuit, and deputies catch a man in a lie.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver and his wife in a high-speed chase, a paranoid man vandalizes his roommate's car, and a shoplifter can't keep her story straight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver foot bails from a still-rolling van and hides nearby. A teen on a dirt bike refuses to stop for Deputies. A man attempts to run from a traffic stop but gets hung up on a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A passenger flees during a traffic stop, deputies respond to a heated dispute between roommates, and an officer encounters an armed suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers utilize the help of the K-9 unit to find a suspect hiding in a shed. A cooperative suspect is faced with a list of charges. A motorcycle chase comes to an end after the suspect ditches the stolen bike and attempts to flee on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quarreling couple attracts their neighbors' attention, and a disoriented driver blames his freak accident on bad weather.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing vehicle leads an officer on a hot pursuit, a deputy encounters a nervous driver with a big secret, and a young cyclist tries to make a quick getaway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman with warrants tries to avoid jail time, deputies confront a hit-and-run suspect, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female shoplifter flees in a stolen box truck and crashes into a retaining wall. A green Honda runs in Wichita. A female passenger in Florida admits to hiding drugs and a pipe in her intimate area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vigilant neighbor calls the police when he sees a man robbing a liquor store, and a driver refuses to pull over while driving his new friend's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue a mentally unwell man, a driver is arrested for crystal meth possession after his passengers incriminate him, and an arrested suspect apologizes to his son.

programme.desc: Two young men are found murdered after scamming Sam Braun's casinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A casino employee is beaten and raped on her way home from work, but she survives and identifies her attacker.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Heavy rains in Vegas wash up a body in the storm drains. As the team investigates, they find bones in the sewer system that could only be murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted from outside a convenience store, triggering an Amber alert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a hotel suite with symptoms of the ebola virus.

programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a woman after a swap party where the married couples in the neighborhood meet and switch partners.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The killer from The Execution of Catherine Willows returns with deadly results.

programme.desc: A woman who was pulled over by the police is found murdered two miles up the road from the stop. It's not long before Robbins determines that the woman is, genetically speaking, not a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Cuatro hermanos

programme.title: Cautiva

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.desc: Three sailors murder a fourth after he double crossed them in a little smuggling operation. The victim's girlfriend witnesses the murder and then tries to hide.

programme.title: Hunter

programme.desc: A killer storm strikes, leaving the Bundys and D'Arcys sharing a basement shelter.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The case of a gruesome stabbing death of a bullied teenager remains unsolved for 27 years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After U.S. Navy sailor disappears in 68, the Navy claims he went AWOL. But his sister works for over 30 years to prove that he was really killed. And DNA from a cigarette butt helps detectives to unravel a 20-year-old case of rape and murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: On a summer night in 1987, a 17-year-old girl to come home is found raped and strangled near the Hudson River. And In 1983, a young mother is raped and murdered at work. The crime remains unsolved for two decades.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: While hiking with husband Dennis in Montana, Leslee Larson fell into Wolf Creek. Then Dennis is convicted of murdering his wife, while in Main. And 15-year-old papergirl Penny Parker goes missing, then her body is found by a search volunteer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A videotape made at an ATM machine helps police in Louisville, KY, to nab a man suspected of raping 13 women. And a DA investigator in Georgia helps crack a murder case that his father, a police chief, first worked on 30 years before.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In 1979 Janie Landers disappears from a home for the impaired--the latest consequence of the facility's history of neglect. When Janie's body is found, there are many suspects but it is years before the killer is found.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police solve a murder when divers find a skeleton in a car at the bottom of a river, and a dead dog's DNA helps crack open a 6-year-old case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Work of an Alberta, Canada detective finally pays off when he tracks down the man who murdered a 6-year-old girl 10 years earlier. And when police search for the killer of a hitchhiker, they find that the victim's diary is one of their best clues.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The longest-running cold case of a law enforcement officer in the United States was the murder of Sheriff's Lt. Joe Clark.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: On February 2, 2010, two masked gunmen commit a violent robbery and shoot Michael Temple Jr., rendering him a quadriplegic for five years before his death. In this unusual cold case, DNA is used to create a sketch of the killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A police investigator discovers a letter written 16 years earlier that provides clues to a woman's murder. And a firearms expert supplies the evidence that South Carolina authorities need to put a man on trial in 2002 for a murder committed in 1961.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A mother is suspected in the murders of two of her daughters when her third daughter finally convinces police to reopen two cold cases.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: With access to the San Francisco Police Department's work, including saliva samples taken from letters the infamous Zodiac Killer sent 30 years ago, we reevaluate the case of the serial killer who began terrorizing California in the late 1960s.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In a city of eight million, landlord Bruce Blackwood disappears without a trace in March 2006. Though there is no body, the NYPD is sure this is a homicide and they spend the next nine years searching for answers.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Stan agrees to help a group of adorable woodland critters build a manger in anticipation of the birth of their Lord and Savior, only to find out that they serve Satan.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too.

programme.desc: Kenny is the only one of his friends to get the newest, coolest portable gaming device and Cartman can't deal with it. Will they remain best friends forever?

programme.title: South Park

programme.desc: Paleontologists Othniel Marsh and Edward Cope become rivals, and Penzias & Wilson discover the echo of the Big Bang. Featuring Greg Kinnear, Stephen Merchant, Justin Long, Jason Ritter, Tony Hale and Christopher Meloni.

programme.title: Drunk History

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Wayne Wheeler becomes the face of Prohibition, Dorothy Fuldheim breaks barriers in news broadcasting, and Muhammad Ali refuses to fight in the Vietnam War. Featuring Gaius Charles, Samm Levine, Mary Elizabeth Ellis, George Wallace and Ron Funches.

programme.title: Con el culo al aire
programme.desc: Lola está en su día happy y para sorpresa de Tino se ha echado novio: Mario. A Tino y Javi les extraña que a Mario no le importe que Lola sea bipolar y alcohólica, así que empiezan a sospechar de él.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria substituye a Quinn haciendo su trabajo de niñera, ya que Quinn organizó una cita el mismo día. Daria no está interesada en ser una figura de autoridad, pero termina al cuidado de dos niños muy tranquilos a cambio del dinero.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Sandi, Stacy y Tiffany se hacen cirugías estéticas en la nariz, al igual que otra alumna que desea entrar al club de modas, y Quinn está indecisa sobre si debería hacerse una también para no dejar de ser la más linda.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria y Quinn llegan tarde a casa, y sus padres organizan un complicado sistema de castigos, por el cual las dejan un mes encerradas en casa.

programme.title: Daria

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: El excesivo estrés en la vida de Jake lo termina afectando en niveles críticos, por lo que la familia Morgendorffer se toma unos días de vacaciones en el bosque que finalmente no resultarán de mucha ayuda.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: La preparatoria de Lawndale se prepara para recibir con entusiasmo a un jugador estrella de futbol americano, Tommy Sherman, quien aparecerá en la escuela por un acto en su honor. No le cae bien a nadie, en especial a Daria y Jane.

programme.title: Daria

programme.desc: The rookies are given "makeovers" to transform them into the image of a DCC.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final dance rehearsal of week 7 has a surprise guest judge who puts everyone on edge. Ultimately, in Kelli's office, the tears flow as some dreams surprisingly come to an end.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Join 65,000 screaming Cowboys fans as the cheerleaders hit the turf and wow the entire stadium and themselves during their first Dallas Cowboys football game of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After being severely beaten in her own home, a high school girl goes under hypnosis to try to identify her attacker.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Rachel Buffett, whose former fiancé, Daniel Wozniak, was convicted of two grisly murders, talks about being at the center of the investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An investigation of a woman found murdered in Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When three teenage friends set out to pursue their dreams, one ends up dead.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A doctor ingests a lethal chemical, causing friends to wonder if it was an attempt at suicide or if he was poisoned -- until a love triangle is uncovered.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Georgia couple's romantic tryst takes a deadly turn, leaving investigators stumped -- until tire treads at the scene and cell phone calls reveal a twisted plot.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A love triangle leads to years of stalking, property destruction, threats, and murder.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Kathleen Schroll makes a phone call right before her death where she identifies her killer, which leads to an arrest. Two trials and 12 years later, authorities begin to wonder who was really the victim.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When an Iowa woman is attacked while home alone with her three children, the confrontation turns deadly.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a college student leads authorities to her theater group and a new crime that exposes the truth.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Rapper Meek Mill interview; exploring controversies surrounding the criminal justice system, including the parole system, wrongful convictions, challenges faced by law enforcement, alleged police abuse and more.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a 23-year-old woman goes missing from a shopping mall in Plano, Texas, her family searches for her, and the police seek out who is responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man uses a dating site to meet and murder a college student.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Viva La Flav
programme.desc: The final two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Puerto Vallarta for an exotic three day Mexican getaway.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Finale)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the original Flavorettes are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to run background checks on the remaining 5 guys, so she invites their ex-girlfriends to spend a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their exes give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better, so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Final Adios
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final 2 men to pack their bags because they're goin' to Playa Car, Mexico for an exotic getaway!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Don't Threaten Me with a Good Time

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya fails her CPR and now she can’t spend the summer lifeguarding at the beach with Zig.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone’s spooked by Gloria’s disappearance as strange things continue to happen.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Determined to get to the bottom of Mr. Bane’s creepy info trove, Zoe and Grace break into his car only to discover more incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen-year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangaea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved, and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the Hyaenodon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Tai Chi Zero
programme.desc: A gifted martial artist protects his adopted village from a villain who wants to build a railroad through the centre of the community.

programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: The Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: In 13th century China, a martial arts prodigy named Zhang Sanfeng faces personal tragedy and political turmoil. Caught between warring factions, he develops the revolutionary art of Tai Chi amid chaos and conspiracy.

programme.title: Master of Death
programme.desc: After training for 18 years with a shaolin monk, Chow sets off to take revenge on the men that killed his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, the body of Colorado real estate developer Alan Helmick was found by his wife, Miriam, who then became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappears from a strip club in East Hartford, CT. Police consider various patrons of the club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: Fearing for the fate of the Candy Realm, the dream chasers evacuate its inhabitants while Mateo and Astrid infiltrate the Midnight Raven.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La Bebeshita busca a Queen para hablar, pero tambien para desgreñarla. En un barco pirata, Queen le promete amor a Fano mientras que en la Villa le espera un fantasma del pasado. Dos EX deben regresar al mar por culpa de la Sala Tornado.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Las peleas en la Villa no cesan. Asaf prueba más labios y el corazon de Lilian se parte. Más Ex se van mientras que la ultima en llegar, espera en la Love Suite. La Sala Tornado llama a Brandon y repite la historia, pero ahora con Queen.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brushes his teeth in his bathroom talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth, and even visits a dentist's office!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plants a seed and visits a conservatory. King Friday orders Handyman Negri to sing a song about not being afraid. This makes the neighbors even more anxious about the “big thing” that is to arrive in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brings in a cat named Jimmy and remembers him as a kitten. He shows pictures of babies that have grown into adults. Everyone gathers at the castle just as the big thing rolls into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays games that require patience. Purple Panda experiments with a powder that causes flowers to grow. Prince Tuesday wishes the powder to make him grow. Mister Rogers goes to see the Harlem Spiritual Ensemble practice.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays dress-up with wigs and glasses, and says: “You can get dressed up in the fanciest of things, but the best style comes from inside, and it often spreads on your face with a smile.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a wooden toy airplane. Handyman Negri is working on a musical portrait of King Friday. Neighbor Aber provides his own tribute to King Friday as he mans his plane and draws a sky-written portrait of the King.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Arenita deciden hacer una competencia para ver quien es mejor de los dos. / Una Ostra en cautiverio comienza a llorar durante la visita de Bob Esponja y Patricio, justo después de que Bob le lanza un maní para despertarla.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja, Patricio y Calamardo se topan con el barco del Holandés Volador, quien los obliga a trabajar en el o ser comidos. / Llega el día en el que Gary debe de tomar un baño, pero él se niega y Bob Esponja hará todo lo posible.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo pierde una apuesta y Bob Esponja es obligado a ir a trabajar en el Balde de Bocados. / Bob Esponja y Patricio encuentran un lápiz mágico que da vida a todo lo que dibujan.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio tiene una caja secreta y no deja que nadie vea dentro de ella. Pero Bob Esponja no aguanta la curiosidad e intenta ver dentro de ella. / Calamardo forma una banda musical cuando Calamarino Elegante.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo le cuenta a Bob una historia de terror para burlarse de él. Luego de asustarlo, Calamardo le dice la verdad a Bob. / Don Cangrejo conoce a la Señora Puff y se enamora de ella, esto le provoca que gaste su dinero sin control.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: La Señora Puff deja de tarea hacer un ensayo acerca de que no hacer ante una luz de parada. Pero a Bob Esponja no se le ocurren ideas. / Patricio recibe la visita de sus padres, pero quiere que ya no piensen que es un despistado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio conocen una nueva palabra y la empiezan a decir una y otra vez sin saber que es una mala palabra. / Calamardo comienza a dar clases de arte, y Bob Esponja es tan bueno que hace una gran estatua.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo descubre que la jalea de medusa en las Cangreburguers le gusta mucho a los clientes. / Bob Esponja y Patricio se vuelven contrincantes en la batalla más importante de comida.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja, Patricio y Calamardo se encuentran perdidos, con solo una caracola mágica para guiarlos / Es Primavera en Fondo de Bikini y Bob Esponja encuentra un salvaje caballo de mar y decide quedarse con ella

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Shandorians prepare for an all-out attack on their priestly adversaries, Chopper meets the mysterious creatures that saved his life, and Nami makes an astonishing discovery about the origins of Upper Yard.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Shandorians continue their battle for control of Upper Yard, the Straw Hats celebrate their happy reunion by swapping stories over a campfire and feasting on barbequed Skyshark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Laki’s pursuit of precious Vearth causes one of her Shandorian comrades to be injured during the battle with Ohm. As night falls on Upper Yard, the Straw Hats dream of gold while dancing with wolves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The electrifying deity of Skypiea, God Eneru, grants his priests unlimited power in their hunt for the Straw Hats. Usopp has a plan to get the mysteriously-repaired Going Merry back in the water, but it involves using Chopper as bait!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats scatter when their search for gold uncovers a giant python, and Gan Fall reveals the tragic story of Jaya’s arrival in the sky. Meanwhile, Wyper readies the Shandorians for a raid on Eneru’s shrine!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the heartless god of Upper Yard eagerly anticipates the dawning of Sky Warefare, the Shandorian forces are savagely snared by the Ordeal of String, and Luffy wanders into the fight of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro rushes to perfect a deadly technique known as the Flying Blade Attack. The move proves difficult to master, but it could be the key to the swordsman surviving a battle with the Shandorian warrior, Braham.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Usopp are driven to their knees by the electrifying presence of god, Luffy is nearly incinerated by Wyper’s Burn Bazooka, and Nami joins Gan Fall in a fight against two killer clones!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper unleashes the fury of his Rumble Ball during a sticky slugfest with a swap cloud spewing priest of Upper Yard. Can the little reindeer discover his opponent’s lone weakness before it’s too late?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the Knight of the Sky team up to obliterate two bumbling, balloon-shaped bad guys, and God Eneru relies on his astounding invincibility to torment a noble Shandorian warrior.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin’s search for a mystical city of gold is interrupted by Yama, one of Eneru’s faithful servants. When the rampaging warrior destroys some ancient ruins, he provokes the wrath of Robin’s many fists of fury!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Priest Ohm silences Chopper with an attack from which few – if any – ever recover. Meanwhile, Luffy begins to notice something strange about his cave-like prison, and four fearsome warriors prepare for battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Gan Fall, Wyper, Ohm, and a prizefighting pooch gather for a ferocious free-for-all at the site of the Upper Ruins. While the battle rages, Luffy tries to punch his way out of the belly of a poisonous python!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Wyper are out to beat down the same bad guys, but will they realize it soon enough to survive a white-barbed death match of doom? Deep in the belly of the python, Nami and Luffy enjoy what could be a short-lived reunion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eager to end their battle, Zoro aims the awesome destructive power of his 108 Caliber Phoenix at the sinister Priest Ohm! Elsewhere, god demands that Robin help him search for a legendary golden bell.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru begins a deadly rampage aimed at exterminating the heavenly beings of Skypiea, and the ruins of Shandora become the scene of a bloody contest where survival is the name of the game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gan Fall, Wyper, Zoro, and Robin join forces for an attack on God Eneru. Despite their furious onslaught, the four warriors prove powerless to harm the thunderous deity until Wyper utilizes the power of a mystical stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru makes a shocking recovery from wounds that should have ended his reign of terror. Zoro and Wyper muster the strength for one final stand, and Nami must choose between her friends – and survival.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges from his serpentine tomb with one thing on his mind: revenge! As the rubber-man sets out to settle the score with God Eneru, Conis rushes to warn her people of their impending doom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the citizens of the sky run for their lives, Eneru issues in the dawn of Deathpiea! Luffy is determined to stop the madman, but first he must discover a way to lay hands on the heinous holy man!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A handful of gold sends Luffy hurtling towards his death, Sanji and Usopp mount a midair rescue mission, and Nami prepares for an electrifying showdown with God Eneru!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp arrives just in time to save Nami from a lethal thunderbolt, but even their combined powers are no match for Eneru. While they scramble for an escape route, Sanji stealthily searches for a way to sabotage god’s ark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite being slowed by an arm encased in gold, Luffy races up a giant beanstalk on a mission to settle the score with Eneru! Elsewhere, the people of Skypiea feel the jolt of god’s wrath!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback offers a glimpse at the lives of two legendary figures in Skypiea’s history: Montblanc Noland and the ferocious warrior Kalgara!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The look back at the legend of Montblanc Noland and Kalgara the warrior continues with the story of how these two very different men suddenly found friendship – and then lost it just as quickly!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Montblanc Noland and the warrior Kalgara succeed in settling their difference before parting ways, but the laws of nature and man conspire to keep them apart – permanently!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eneru strikes Angel Island with a devastating lightning bolt, and Luffy continues his heroic climb up the giant beanstalk. The rubber-man refuses to stop until he rings the golden bell – no matter what the cost!

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When the owner of a Brooklyn pizzeria is gunned down in broad daylight in his backyard, the news publishes mafia theories; the FBI joins the NYPD to investigate.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: On a bone-chilling January morning, when a 39-year-old day care owner goes missing, her fiancé finds her wallet, keys and phone still in the house they share; the mystery deepens when the K9 unit searches the home but finds no trace of her.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Criminology student Imette St. Guillen was dedicating her life to catching killers when she herself was caught by one while celebrating her birthday late at night at a bar in Lower Manhattan.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Millionaire banker and mother-of-two Shele Covlin has it all, until she fatally slips and falls in her Upper West Side bathtub; days after her burial, information emerges, and the NYPD realizes this may be no accident.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Realtor to the stars Linda Stein is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment, but her larger-than-life personality meant Linda made enemies as well as admirers; with evidence from the crime scene, only painstaking sleuthing can identify her killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a retired cop is found shot to death on a subway train in Brooklyn, detectives soon discover that his death is linked to two other seemingly random shootings in the previous thirteen hours.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a sibling dispute over money turns into a double murder, all of Brooklyn is on alert for the missing killer; days turn into months and then years, as the NYPD manhunt turns into a national and international chase for the fugitive.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found hidden in tall reeds in a quiet park near her home, fear grips the Queens neighborhood; after months of ceaseless investigation, a clue from the past leads NYPD detectives to an unexpected killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Days before the New Millennium, a jailed informant calls the NYPD with a cryptic tip about a murder, sending detectives on a hunt through dozens of New York's high-rise buildings, in search of a crime scene - and a body.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Two young women come to New York with big city dreams, but a chance encounter triggers a sequence of events that shatters those dreams forever; detectives must piece together a series of puzzling clues to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Roger Brooks, popular maître d' at one of the oldest restaurants in New York, is found slain in his apartment on the city's famous Restaurant Row; detectives discover a hidden side to the victim, and the chilling possibility of other victims.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a young banker disappears, police piece together her final moments, leading them to a professional who's not as he presents himself.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of a beloved Queens gay man, a community bands together while a detective goes undercover to catch the killers.

programme.title: Snowpiercer

programme.title: The Librarians

programme.title: The Librarians
